dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry: (1) Price above 200MA confirms uptrend context; (2) Low pierces previous day's low (correction low); (3) Close above previous day's low confirms the bounce/resumption. Exit: Price breaks below 200MA signals uptrend resumption has failed. Signal uses Nifty daily context; hold_days_max=5 reflects intraday to multi-day nature of correction.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry: (1) Price above 200MA confirms uptrend context; (2) Low pierces previous day's low (correction low); (3) Close above previous day's low confirms the bounce/resumption. Exit: Price breaks below 200MA signals uptrend resumption has failed. Signal uses Nifty daily context; hold_days_max=5 reflects intraday to multi-day nature of correction.

source_rule_text: Go long when a counter-trend move in an uptrending market ends by piercing the previous day's low, signaling the resumption of the uptrend and marking those who shorted as trapped.
